pool.baseline: i was just staring at the ceiling for like three hours... just thinking about how everything is basically just cosmic noise. like, we spend all this energy trying to build lives and meanings and connections, but in the grand scheme of the universe, it's all just a momentary flicker that means absolutely nothing. it feels so heavy, you know? just the sheer pointlessness of it all.

pool.baseline: it's too much. the wound in my side won't stop bleeding and the wind is just... it's so cold. i don't think i have anything left in me. i'm just so tired of fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like this massive weight around their necks and it's me. i'm just a drain on them.

pool.baseline: it's just gone. everything. the firm, the reputation, the way people actually look at me when i walk into a room... it's all just dead. i feel like i'm walking around as a ghost. there's nothing left to rebuild.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i never thought i'd hate the silence this much. everything just feels so empty now that he's gone.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty now. everything i used to make, every song or painting... it all feels like nothing. there's just this massive hole where my spark used to be. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i just feel like i'm constantly running on empty. no matter what i do, nothing actually gets better, it just feels like i'm stuck in this loop of exhaustion and sadness. like, what's even the point of trying anymore if the outcome is always the same?

pool.baseline: It's just so quiet here today. Everything feels so heavy. I look at my hands and they don't even feel like mine anymore. It's like I'm just... fading away a little more every single day, and there's nothing left to do but wait for the clock to run out.

pool.baseline: i dont see the point in any of this anymore. everything just feels so heavy and empty. like no matter what i do or how hard i try, it doesn't actually change anything. nothing matters in the long run, so why am i even bothering to wake up every day?

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. i did everything i could for him but he still died... i feel like a total failure. i'm so tired of everything. i just want to sleep and not wake up.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just constantly performing. like every single day is just this exhausting act of pretending to be the person everyone expects me to be... it's so tiring. i don't think i can keep up the mask anymore. it feels like there's no version of my life where i actually get to exist as myself without everything falling apart.

pool.baseline: i dont even know how to keep going anymore. every time i think i can catch a break with the bills and the debt, something else just breaks. it feels like i'm drowning in a hole that just keeps getting deeper. there's literally no way out of this loop.

pool.baseline: i feel like i’ve been walking for so long... just through this endless, grey fog. and i finally reached the edge. the path just... stops. there’s nothing left ahead of me, just this huge, quiet nothingness. it feels like i’ve reached the very end of everything.
